Inspect the source code in the repository to find the cgroup v1 to v2 CPU conversion logic (likely in libcontainer/cgroups/ or similar paths)\n2. Identify where cpu.shares is converted to cpu.weight\n3. Fix the conversion formula so that cpu.shares=1024 maps to cpu.weight=100 (the correct conversion formula is: cpu.weight = 1 + ((cpu.shares - 2) * 9999) / 262142, which gives ~100 for 1024 shares)\n4.
